ips.name: Parameterized Synchronous FIFO
ips.summary: Single-clock elastic buffer for streaming valid-ready datapaths with configurable width and depth.
ips.synthesis: Yosys and commercial ASIC synthesis smoke tested; timing closure depends on depth.
ips.documentation: Integration notes, timing diagram, parameter table, and example wrapper included.

criteria.interface_compatibility: Native valid-ready wrapper and simple push/pop core ports.
criteria.configurability: Width, depth, and almost-full mode configurable.
criteria.documentation_quality: Has integration notes and waveform examples.

ips.behavior: Stores input beats when valid and space are available; presents output beats until downstream ready consumes them.
integration_notes: Match DATA_WIDTH to stream payload width.
Size DEPTH from maximum tolerated backpressure and burst length.
Confirm reset polarity before wrapper integration.
known_limits: Large depths should infer memory rather than flops

ips.name: AXI-lite Register Bank
ips.summary: Configurable AXI-lite slave register block for control/status paths.
ips.synthesis: FPGA and ASIC synthesis supported with registered read data.
ips.documentation: Complete register-map examples and integration checklist.

criteria.configurability: Address width, data width, and register count configurable.
criteria.verification_status: Protocol testbench and formal checks available.

ips.behavior: Accepts AXI-lite reads and writes, maps them into software-visible registers, and exposes register fields to hardware.
integration_notes: Freeze register map before firmware handoff.
Add side-effect semantics for clear-on-write or pulse fields in wrapper logic.

ips.name: Simple SRAM Controller
ips.summary: Single-port SRAM controller with request/response handshake and optional byte enables.
ips.synthesis: Synthesizes to SRAM macro wrapper or FPGA block RAM wrapper.
ips.documentation: Basic timing diagram and macro-binding notes.

criteria.function_match: Mediates reads and writes to single-port memory.
criteria.interface_compatibility: Valid-ready request path and SRAM macro pins.
criteria.configurability: Address, data, and byte-enable modes configurable.
criteria.synthesis_support: Macro and FPGA wrapper styles supported.

ips.behavior: Serializes memory read/write requests and returns read data after configured latency.
integration_notes: Set latency to match selected memory macro.
Check byte-enable polarity against target memory compiler.

ips.name: Streaming Width Adapter
ips.summary: Packs or unpacks valid-ready stream payloads between different data widths.
ips.documentation: Examples for widening, narrowing, and backpressure behavior.
ips.behavior: Accumulates or splits stream beats while preserving valid-ready flow control.
integration_notes: Confirm packet boundary behavior if packets are present.
known_limits: Requires integer width ratio in v1
